Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or prediabetes. LDL cholesterol is above the recommended range, suggesting increased cardiovascular risk. Chloride is slightly elevated and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters, including renal function and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and lipid management.
